ddls:
CREATE TABLE "functions" (
  "function_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each function */,
  "function_name" TEXT /* Name of the function */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the function */,
  "formula" TEXT /* Formula of the function */,
  "function_type" TEXT /* Type of the function (e.g., polynomial, trigonometric) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the function was created */,
  "modification_date" TEXT /* Date the function was last modified */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the function */,
  "modified_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who last modified the function */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_modified_by FOREIGN KEY ("modified_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_functions_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES function_types ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function the version belongs to */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_versions_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function the data point belongs to */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function version */,
  "x_value" REAL /* X value of the data point */,
  "y_value" REAL /* Y value of the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_data_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES function_versions ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_data_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the type */,
  "parent_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent function type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed) */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "workspaces" (
  "workspace_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each workspace */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user the workspace belongs to */,
  "workspace_name" TEXT /* Name of the workspace */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the workspace */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("workspace_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the function */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_user_access_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "function_shares" (
  "share_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each share event */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function being shared */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user sharing the function */,
  "shared_with" INTEGER /* ID of the user the function is shared with */,
  "share_date" TEXT /* Date when the function was shared */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Date when the shared access expires */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("share_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_shares_shared_with FOREIGN KEY ("shared_with") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_shares_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_function_shares_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function being collaborated on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who is collaborating */,
  "collaboration_date" TEXT /* Date the collaboration was initiated */,
  "collaboration_status" TEXT /* Current status of the collaboration (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_exports" (
  "export_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each export */,
  "function_id" INTEGER /* ID of the function being exported */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who exported the data */,
  "export_date" TEXT /* Date the data was exported */,
  "export_format" TEXT /* Format of the exported data (e.g., CSV, Excel) */,
  "export_status" TEXT /* Status of the data export (e.g., pending, completed, failed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("export_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_function_id FOREIGN KEY ("function_id") REFERENCES functions ("function_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_exports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_user" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "user_id")
)
